title: Zara India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Zara India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Zara India! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Varanasi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Zara India:
Zara India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zara India!
